key_evidence: April 29: 7 families filed Tumbler Ridge lawsuit seeking financial damages + reporting protocols + independent monitoring

events.label: Multi-arc accumulation: front-group funding + PBC completion + safety-team-disbanding testimony

methodology_note: Sub-threshold accumulation. Cumulative since May 5 baseline: -3.6 (May 7 sub-threshold -1.7 + May 27 sub-threshold -1.9). One more cycle of direction-confirming sub-threshold movement would justify formal apply protocol.
